productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Felisa Brown Casual Shoes
description: Classy, stylish and uber cool, these Felisa casual slip-ons with a square toe design from buckaroo are a must have in every suave man's collection. Since they have no laces, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease. Made from high quality leather, they are comfortable enough to be worn all day long. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or chinos to feel awesome and look great. Upper Full grain leather upper, for added durability and style Square toe design for added attraction and comfort Hidden elastic gores on either side for a more versatile Fit Laceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Contrast thread detailing for added structure and style Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Leaf patterned grooves for better traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
